_note: Ground truth relevance labels. Candidate IDs match candidate_name in ranked_results.json — the LLM-extracted full name from each resume. Labels were assigned before running the system.

_label_scale.1.0: Good Match — meets the bar, should be shortlisted
_label_scale.0.5: Partial Match — could interview with reservations
_label_scale.0.0: Poor Match — should not be shortlisted

_id_note: IDs must match candidate_name field in ranked_results.json exactly. RunSaver stores candidate_name from resume.identity.full_name (LLM-extracted), not from the filename.

candidates.note: Staff MLE at Cohere, 7+ YoE, deep LLM/RAG/agent stack, IIT+CMU, publications. Expected rank: 1.
PhD+postdoc, exceptional research depth, but 2 seniority levels below Lead, no production MLOps. Good Match — gap is a caveat, not a demotion. Expected rank: 2.
Sr. MLOps Engineer, strong infra/deployment, but no NLP/LLM training depth. Expected rank: 3-4.
Sr. Data Scientist, classical ML strong, NLP is TF-IDF only, no LLMs/RAG/RL. Expected rank: 3-4.
Frontend Engineer. Zero ML overlap. Should gate out.
Management Consultant. No technical ML skills. Should gate out.
Business Analyst. SQL/Python for reporting only. Should gate out.
Backend SWE. Strong Python/Go but zero ML. Should gate out.
Product Manager. A/B testing and SQL in product context, not ML. Should gate out.
